recording.micToggleDisabledTip: Microphone cannot be toggled during recording

update.errorTitle: Update check failed. Click to retry.

recording.preparingSubtitle: Opening the editor in a moment

sourceSelector.windowsNote: Only visible (non-minimized) windows can be recorded.

permissions.screenRecordingNeeded: ScreenTool needs Screen Recording permission before you start. System Settings has been opened. After enabling it, quit and reopen ScreenTool.
permissions.screenRecordingMissing: Screen Recording permission is still missing. System Settings has been opened again. Enable it, then quit and reopen ScreenTool before recording.
permissions.accessibilityNeeded: ScreenTool also needs Accessibility permission for cursor tracking. System Settings has been opened. After enabling it, quit and reopen ScreenTool.
permissions.accessibilityMissing: Accessibility permission is still missing. System Settings has been opened again. Enable it, then quit and reopen ScreenTool before recording.
permissions.selectSource: Please select a source to record
permissions.systemAudioUnavailable: System audio is not available for this source. Recording will continue without system audio.
permissions.microphoneDenied: Microphone access was denied. Recording will continue without microphone audio.
permissions.failedToFinishMacRecording: Failed to finish the macOS recording, so the editor was not opened.
permissions.failedToFinishRecording: Failed to finish the recording, so the editor was not opened.
permissions.failedToSaveFallbackMicrophone: Failed to save the fallback microphone audio track
permissions.microphoneFallbackFailed: {{error}}. Recording will continue without microphone audio.
permissions.nativeWindowsCheckFailed: Unable to check native Windows capture. Falling back to browser capture.
permissions.nativeWindowsStartFailed: Native Windows capture failed to start. Falling back to browser capture.
permissions.nativeWindowsUnavailable: Native Windows capture is unavailable. Falling back to browser capture.
permissions.savedWithoutFallbackMicrophone: {{error}}. Recording was saved without the fallback microphone track.
